news.headline: Binary Defense has been recognized in the 2024 Gartner Market Guide for Managed Detection and Response for the sixth consecutive year.
news.summary: For the sixth consecutive year, Binary Defense has been acknowledged in the annual Gartner report.

news.headline: Wall Street cautiously eyes the week ahead. Nvidia drops, S&P 500 could hit all-time highs. Tech stocks may see a 15% gain. Bond yields rise, global cues positive. Nasdaq +0.07%, S&P 500 +0.14%, Dow +0.16%, Russell 2000 +0.16% in premarket. Last week, techs and small caps up, S&P 500 and Dow down slightly. Shares more details on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: U.S. stocks are expected to begin the week cautiously, as futures trading suggests a subdued start. Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) may continue its decline, impacting tech stocks, while a bullish analyst predicts a 15% increase in tech stocks in the second half of the year due to expanding AI use cases. Bond yields and manufacturing activity readings will be watched closely on Monday. Global cues are positive, and commodities are trading up. In premarket trading, Nasdaq 100 is up 0.07%, S&P 500 up 0.14%, Dow up 0.16%, and R2K up 0.16%. Stocks closed the previous week mixed, with techs and small-caps gaining while S&P 500 and Dow fell marginally. Key index performances: Nasdaq Composite +0.24%, S&P 500 -0.06%, Dow Industrials -0.08%, Russell 2000 +1.27%. S&P 500 hit 31 new highs this year. Full details available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Global motor-powered two-wheeler telematics market to reach 81.2 million connected units by 2028, with 11.1 million OEM and 13.8 million aftermarket systems in 2023, among 778 million registered bikes.
news.summary: DUBLIN--A report on the "Motor-Powered Two-Wheeler Telematics Market, 1st Edition" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. By the end of 2023, it is projected that there were approximately 11.1 million active motor-powered two-wheeler OEM telematics systems and 13.8 million aftermarket telematics systems worldwide. The global market potential is significant with around 778 million registered motorcycles, scooters, and mopeds as of the end of 2022. The integration of telematics in the two-wheeler industry is on the rise.

news.headline: iQIYI released iQIYI XR app on Apple Vision Pro on June 27 in China, one of the first VisionOS apps.
news.summary: Beijing, July 1, 2024 - iQIYI, a prominent online entertainment platform in China, revealed the introduction of its Apple Vision Pro App, known as iQIYI XR, on June 27. Positioned as among the initial apps on the VisionOS App Store in mainland China, the iQIYI XR app delivers an immersive entertainment experience to users.

news.headline: Spruce Power secures $130M debt financing from Barings, to refinance $125M term loan and gain additional funds.
news.summary: In Denver, Spruce Power Holding Corporation (NYSE: SPRU), a prominent owner and operator of distributed solar energy assets in the U.S., revealed the closure of a new $130 million non-recourse debt facility from Barings LLC. This facility serves to refinance the Company's $125 million term loan (the “SP4 Facility”), additionally offering a net injection of incremental funds.

news.headline: Neurocrine Biosciences' new drug for CAH granted Priority Review by FDA with PDUFA Target Action Dates set for December 2024.
news.summary: The FDA is set to make a decision on the Highly Selective CRF1 Antagonist, potentially the first new treatment for Congenital Adrenal Hyperplasia (CAH) in seven decades, with a PDUFA Target Action Date in late December 2024. Neurocrine Biosciences, Inc. shared this news on July 1, 2024. This groundbreaking treatment could usher in a new era in CAH care, marking a significant milestone in medical advancements. The company's stock, listed as Nasdaq: NBIX, could potentially see fluctuations leading up to the FDA decision due to the high anticipation surrounding this development.

news.headline: Mobile Health launches app for self-care of chronic conditions, covering 18 conditions, saving money for users and employers. No need for insurance.
news.summary: A mobile app in Palo Alto, California set to launch on July 1, 2024 will offer preventative care for 18 chronic conditions, eliminating the need for doctor consultations or telehealth visits. This initiative aims to save individuals and their employers money by providing self-care guidance through the app.

news.headline: Alberta refinery site option for NICO Project expired. Fortune Minerals unable to purchase industrial site in Alberta before the option expiry on June 30, 2024.
news.summary: Fortune Minerals Limited, a company traded on the TSX and OTCQB under the symbols FT and FTMDF respectively, has revealed that the option to buy the JFSL Field Services ULC industrial site in Lamont County, Alberta has lapsed as of June 30, 2024. Although the specific figures were not provided, the parties involved are open to exploring alternate arrangements to facilitate the acquisition. The latest development was announced by Fortune Minerals Limited, a company with additional details available at fortuneminerals.com.

news.headline: Brain development critical for disorders prevention, needs precise neural connection building & teardown timing.
news.summary: In Cold Spring Harbor, New York on July 1, 2024, it was highlighted that the brain undergoes continual changes where trillions of neural connections are formed and dismantled at precise moments. This dynamic process is crucial as disruptions can lead to conditions such as autism. The intricate nature of brain development underscores the importance of timely and accurate neural connectivity, with errors potentially resulting in neurological disorders.

news.headline: Carisma Therapeutics appoints David Scadden, M.D. to board, Marella Thorell resigns; Regina Hodits and Björn Odlander step down.
news.summary: David Scadden, M.D. has been appointed to Carisma Therapeutics Inc. (Nasdaq: CARM) while Marella Thorell joins as well. The Company is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company in Philadelphia. The resignation of Regina Hodits and Björn Odlander has also been announced.

news.headline: Hexatronic's Q2 report for 2024 presentation invite is out now. Join us!
Marti's ride-hailing service exceeds targets with over 1.1M riders and 170K drivers by June 30, 2024. Growth of 121% in riders.
news.summary: In Istanbul, Marti Technologies, Inc. (NYSE American: MRT) has emerged as Türkiye's top mobility super app, offering various urban transportation modes. The company reported a significant milestone on June 30, 2024, with their ride-hailing service attracting more than 1,100,000 riders and boasting a network of over 170,000 registered drivers. These numbers surpass the goals set for the same date, which aimed for 1,000,000 riders and 165,000 drivers. Particularly noteworthy is the 121% surge in ride-hailing users from December 31, 2023, to June 30, 2024.

news.headline: Rutgers University partners with SolarEdge Technologies for agrivoltaics research & New Jersey's Dual-Use Solar Energy Pilot Program.
news.summary: A university in New Jersey, Rutgers University, has chosen SolarEdge for its Agrivoltaics research. This partnership aims to support the development of the Dual-Use Solar Energy Pilot Program in New Jersey. The program seeks to explore the benefits of combining solar energy production with agricultural activities. This collaboration highlights the growing interest in innovative renewable energy solutions, with Rutgers University's initiative showcasing the potential of dual-use solar installations. This decision reflects a strategic move towards sustainable energy practices, emphasizing the importance of research and development in the renewable energy sector. The project's success could lead to significant advancements in the integration of solar technology with agricultural land use, offering a promising solution for maximizing resources and promoting sustainable energy practices.

news.headline: Solidion Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: STI) included in Russell 3000® Index as of July 1, 2024.
news.summary: Solidion Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: STI), a leading provider of advanced battery technology solutions, revealed its inclusion in the widely tracked Russell 3000® Index on July 1, 2024. This move was part of the annual reconstitution of the Russell Index. The addition to the Russell 3000® Index signifies a notable achievement for Solidion, highlighting its growing presence in the market.

news.headline: Nayax launches EV CloudPay, a cloud-based payment solution for EV chargers to simplify payments globally.
news.summary: Nayax introduces EV CloudPay, a cloud-powered payment processing system facilitating convenient payments for drivers at EV charging stations globally. This innovative solution streamlines the payment process amidst complex infrastructure challenges, ensuring seamless transactions for users. With EV CloudPay, drivers can easily pay for their charges, enhancing the overall user experience at charging stations.

news.headline: Watsco (NYSE: WSO) declares $2.70 quarterly dividend on common and Class B stock, payable on July 31, 2024.
news.summary: In Miami, on July 1, 2024, Watsco, Inc. (NYSE: WSO) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $2.70 per outstanding share of its Common and Class B common stock. The dividend is set to be paid on July 31, 2024, to shareholders of record as of July 16, 2024.

news.headline: Dragonfly Energy partners with Refreshment Services Pepsi for liftgate battery systems, offering cost savings and eco benefits.
news.summary: In Reno, Nevada, on July 01, 2024, Dragonfly Energy Holdings Corp. (Nasdaq: DFLI) announced a partnership with Refreshment Services Pepsi, a key distributor for Pepsi-Cola® products, to provide lithium-based liftgate power solutions. As part of this collaboration, Refreshment Services Pepsi, which operates distribution centers throughout the United States, will implement Dragonfly Energy’s Battle Born Batteries® to power liftgate operations in its fleet. This transition to lithium-ion technology is expected to bring substantial cost savings and environmental benefits to Refreshment Services Pepsi compared to the utilization of lead-acid batteries typically used in similar applications.

news.headline: TEDCO in MD reveals the FY25 Board of Directors, with four new members added. Executive Officers are appointed.
news.summary: TEDCO, the economic engine for technology companies in Maryland, revealed its latest update on July 1, 2024. The announcement included the appointment of new executive officers and the incorporation of four pioneering figures into its diverse and influential Board. This move is expected to bring fresh perspectives to the organization's leadership team.

news.headline: Bitfarms: Produced 189 BTC in June 2024, boosted hashrate to 11.4 EH/s, expanded in U.S. and Paraguay.
news.summary: In June 2024, Bitfarms reported earning a total of 189 Bitcoins. They also significantly boosted their mining power, reaching a hashrate of 11.4 Exahashes per second. Furthermore, the company expanded its mining operations in the United States and Paraguay to enhance its global presence and increase its potential for growth.

news.headline: Global Terahertz Technology Market Report 2024-2035 features 27 key players like Canon, Hanwha Systems, & NTT Docomo - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A report titled "Global Terahertz Technology Market 2024-2035" has recently been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. Terahertz technology, which acts as a bridge between microwaves and infrared, is at the forefront of electromagnetic research and applications. The unique capabilities of THz waves have led to significant advancements in various fields such as medical imaging and wireless communications. Over the past few decades, there has been notable progress in THz generation and detection, creating opportunities for innovation.

news.headline: French influence looms as Lagarde, ECB heads to Sintra in June; notable summit since 2019.
Keith Gill acquires 6.6% of Chewy Inc, sets record straight as 'Not a Cat'. Known for GameStop involvement, he stuns market.
news.summary: Keith Gill, a prominent figure in the GameStop trading frenzy, has caused a stir in the market by acquiring a substantial ownership interest in Chewy, Inc. This move comes as a surprise to many, with Gill's stake in Chewy reportedly amounting to a significant percentage of the company's total shares. This development has drawn considerable attention from investors and analysts alike, eager to see how Gill's involvement may impact Chewy's stock performance in the coming days.

news.headline: Sandvik secures SEK 500 million order to supply underground drills to a mining customer in Southeast Asia.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Sandvik announced a significant deal to provide a mining customer in Southeast Asia with a fleet of advanced underground drills. The order, worth around SEK 500 million, was secured in the second quarter of 2024. This contract encompasses a range of intelligent mining equipment, such as development drills and rock tools.

news.headline: UC Davis chooses BluePrints Veterinary Marketing Group as agency for Janice K. Hobbs UC Davis Veterinary Medical Center in Southern California.
news.summary: BluePrints Veterinary Marketing Group, based in Huntington Beach, California, has been chosen as the designated Agency of Record for the newly established Janice K. Hobbs UC Davis Veterinary Medical Center in Southern California. This decision reflects the growing presence and influence of the marketing group in the region. It marks a significant milestone for both entities, as they work together to enhance the visibility and outreach of the veterinary medical center. This collaboration is expected to facilitate strategic marketing efforts and enhance the public awareness of the services offered at the center.

news.headline: Stock market forecast for next six months positive, supported by consistent growth throughout the year, but risks remain.
news.summary: As we approach the midpoint of 2024, the stock market outlook appears positive, benefiting from consistent support that has bolstered stocks throughout the year. Investors should remain vigilant despite the favorable forecast, as certain risks persist. Stay informed to navigate the market in the coming months.

news.headline: Fed inflation rate rises at slowest pace since late 2020, impacting S&P 500 as investors expect rate-cuts.
news.summary: The latest Federal Reserve inflation rate experienced its smallest increase since the end of 2020. Investors responded positively to this news, leading to a rise in the S&P 500 index. This development has raised expectations for potential rate cuts in the future.

news.headline: Hilton and Royal Caribbean reach new highs on IBD's top stock lists. Check for updates on best-performing stocks.
news.summary: The latest update of IBD’s top-performing stock lists features companies such as Hilton and Royal Caribbean reaching new highs. Discover the newly added stocks and those that were removed from the list. Keep an eye on these watchlists for potential top-performing stocks. Check out the updated lists on Investor's Business Daily for more information.

news.headline: Peter Schiff warns Bitcoin investors of potential losses, citing shift from gold ETFs. Gold closed Q2 with 4% gain.
news.summary: Renowned economist and noted Bitcoin critic Peter Schiff has raised concerns for investors, indicating a negative forecast. Despite this, an investment specialist has highlighted three positive indicators for the cryptocurrency.Schiff recently pointed out that investors who transitioned from gold ETFs to Bitcoin ETFs at the conclusion of Q1 are experiencing a 20% decrease in value. He cautioned that this situation is anticipated to worsen in the future. By the end of Q2, gold had seen a 4% increase, whereas Bitcoin was down more than 15% with two trading days remaining. Schiff's remarks emphasize a bleak perspective on Bitcoin's upcoming performance, asserting that the circumstances could deteriorate significantly for these investors.In summary, gold closed Q2 with a 4% gain, contrasting Bitcoin's notable decline. For more detailed information, please visit the website of Benzinga.

news.headline: GreenPower reports $39.3M revenue for 2024. Expanding manufacturing facilities and making strides in EV sector. School bus sales increased four-fold.
news.summary: GreenPower Motor Company Inc. reported its results for the year ended March 31, 2024, with Chairman and CEO Fraser Atkinson highlighting strides in transitioning to a production plan driven by customer orders. The company completed its West Virginia manufacturing facility and delivered the first all-electric school buses. The year saw a four-fold increase in school bus sales, with Type D BEAST and Type A Nano BEAST buses currently in production. An investment was also made in GP Truck Body to improve delivery times for upfitting EV Star Cab & Chassis with truck bodies. A conference call is scheduled for July 1, 2024, at 9:30 a.m. EDT/6:30 a.m. PDT.

news.headline: Dave Portnoy plans for Barstool Sports to purchase up to $10 million worth of Bitcoin, only if the price drops from $60,000.
news.summary: Dave Portnoy, a prominent media figure, announced his intention for Barstool Sports to invest up to $10 million in Bitcoin. However, he clarified that they will not make the purchase if the price of Bitcoin reaches $60,000.

news.headline: For long-term investing success, ignore the 2024 election's impact on your portfolio and focus on other factors instead.
news.summary: According to our columnist, it is generally advised that individuals focus on long-term investment strategies rather than getting caught up in political factors, with the exception of a significant caveat. The columnist suggests that for the majority of people, concentrating on their long-term investment goals without being overly influenced by political events could lead to better financial outcomes in the future.

news.headline: Logan Paul files lawsuit against YouTuber Coffeezilla for libel regarding allegations on CryptoZoo game, claiming hidden facts.
news.summary: Popular social media personality Logan Paul is alleging that content creator Coffeezilla deliberately withheld crucial details that could clear Paul's name regarding the failed cryptocurrency game. Paul asserts that Coffeezilla intentionally hid information that could prove Paul's innocence in the controversy surrounding the project.

news.headline: Julian Assange's pursuit of transparency revolutionized world, making no secret safe and no institution trusted.
news.summary: The founder of WikiLeaks, through his bold pursuit of complete transparency, has set the stage for a global environment where no secret remains secure and no institution can be fully relied upon.

news.headline: Study shows potential for containing bird flu outbreak in cows, says scientists after small experiment.
news.summary: Researchers have discovered promising results from a limited study that suggest there is potential to control the outbreak affecting dairy cattle.

news.headline: Presidio Property Trust closes $1.74M public offering of Series D Preferred Stock, selling 109,054 shares at $16/share.
news.summary: Presidio Property Trust, a diversified real estate investment trust listed on NASDAQ as SQFT, completed a public offering on June 24, 2024. The offering consisted of 109,054 shares of its 9.375% Series D Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock with a par value of $0.01 per share. Priced at $16.00 per share, the offering generated around $1.74 million in gross proceeds, excluding underwriting discounts and offering expenses.

news.headline: Numerous CEOs continue to back Biden despite policy grievances. They support him over Trump.
news.summary: Some business leaders have voiced concerns regarding certain policies and communication from President Biden. Despite this, there has not been a large-scale withdrawal of support from corporate executives.

news.headline: Gemini: Updated flagship AI model from Google released, with improved performance and features.
news.summary: In the latest updates, it has been reported that the number of confirmed COVID-19 cases worldwide has surpassed 200 million. The global death toll from the virus has also exceeded 4.2 million. In response to the surge in cases, many countries are implementing stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus. The vaccination campaign continues to be a priority, with over 4.6 billion doses administered globally. However, disparities in vaccine distribution persist, with low-income countries facing challenges in securing an adequate supply. Despite efforts to control the spread, new variants of the virus continue to emerge, posing challenges to containment efforts. Public health officials emphasize the importance of following safety guidelines and getting vaccinated to protect against severe outcomes.

news.headline: Biden and Trump offer different tax policies with Trump's 21% corporate tax rate and cuts for top earners, while Biden plans to let cuts for the wealthy expire but keep for those under $400,000.
news.summary: With the November election approaching, President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump have proposed contrasting tax policies for the American people as they potentially take office in late January 2025. Trump aims to maintain the 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, setting the corporate tax rate at 21% and reducing taxes for individuals - notably lowering the top earners' rate from 39.6% to 37%. The Act, set to end in 2025, increased standard deductions significantly, from $14,600 to $29,200 for married filers and single ones respectively, as per reports from FOX Business. Conversely, Biden plans to allow Trump's tax cuts for high-income earners to expire, yet intends to preserve reductions for those earning below $400,000.

news.headline: Fed's inflation gauge (PCE) set to drop to 2.6% y/y in May, bolstering rate cut expectations - Benzinga.
news.summary: Traders are bracing for the upcoming release of the Personal Consumption Expenditure (PCE) price index data, considered the Federal Reserve's primary indicator of inflation. This data, set to be unveiled by the Bureau of Economic Analysis on Friday, will also include reports on personal income and spending. Investors are particularly interested in whether the Fed's inflation measure will decrease as expected by economists. A potential decline would support efforts to maintain price stability around the 2% target and could heighten anticipation for future interest rate cuts. Anticipated figures suggest that the PCE price index will dip from 2.7% in April to 2.6% in May, based on estimates compiled by Econoday. Projections fall within a range of 2.5% to 2.7%. Additionally, the monthly progression of the PCE price index is predicted to slow to 0.1% from the previous rate of 0.3%. The core PCE price index is also forecasted to lessen from 2.8% to 2.6%.

news.headline: "More pressure from Hamster Kombat for friends - reaching my limit with endless requests to share."
news.summary: Another day, another request to promote to my friends: I feel like I am stepping back from the constant loop of engagement on Hamster Kombat.

news.headline: Egg freezing industry growing as more companies offer benefits for this technology, seen as a way to delay aging.
news.summary: Is it a feminist utopia or a Silicon Valley daydream? My generation is the pioneers in receiving corporate perks for a cutting-edge technology that holds the promise of delaying the aging process. A revolutionary concept that raises questions about gender equality and the power of tech in shaping our future.

news.headline: Abacus Life closes public offering of 11.5M shares at $8 each, raising $92M before expenses.
news.summary: Abacus Life, Inc. (NASDAQ: ABL), a leading alternative asset manager in longevity and actuarial technology, has successfully completed an oversubscribed underwritten public offering. The company announced the closure of 11,500,000 shares of common stock, with an additional 1,500,000 shares purchased by underwriters at $8.00 per share. The total gross proceeds from the offering amounted to around $92 million, prior to deductions for underwriting discounts, commissions, and estimated expenses.

news.headline: Hollywood Blvd vendors, mostly immigrants, face hardships despite lifted restrictions; more obstacles persist.
news.summary: Los restrictions in Los Angeles were lifted, allowing street vendors on Hollywood Boulevard, mostly immigrants, to avoid citations. However, they still face various challenges despite this change.

news.headline: Brad O'Halloran promoted to Executive VP at Brennan Investment Group. Firm specializes in industrial facilities.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Rosemont, Illinois, Brennan Investment Group announced the creation of a new role to bolster their growth strategies. Brennan, a prominent private real estate investment company focusing on acquiring, developing, and managing industrial properties throughout the U.S., is taking steps to expand its operations. This move reflects the company's commitment to enhancing its market presence and increasing its portfolio. The exact numbers and details regarding this new position and its implications were not provided.

news.headline: Creality showcased K2 Plus Multi-color 3D Printer and new tech at RAPID+TCT in LA in June 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Creality, a prominent player in the 3D printing sector, completed its participation at RAPID+TCT 2024 in Los Angeles, California, from June 25 to 27. This event, known for highlighting advanced 3D technologies, attracted industry professionals and enthusiasts. Creality's presence at the event, marked by innovative displays and engaging activities, garnered significant attention, further solidifying its position as a leader in the field.

news.headline: Similarweb acquires 42matters, enhancing app intelligence capabilities; App analytics market to reach $15.7B by 2028.
news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel, Similarweb Ltd. (NYSE: SMWB) disclosed its acquisition of 42matters, an app intelligence provider in Zurich, Switzerland. This move is pivotal for Similarweb's enhancement of data capabilities in the prospering app analytics sector. The industry is projected to hit $15.7 billion by 2028, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 20.2%. By incorporating 42matters' innovative solutions into its services, Similarweb seeks to solidify its position in the market.

news.headline: USANA's Kevin Guest promotes social connections during "Social Wellness Month." July 2024 focuses on boosting relationships.
news.summary: In Salt Lake City on July 1, 2024, Kevin Guest, the executive chairman of USANA Health Sciences (NYSE: USNA), is highlighting the importance of enhancing social connections during "Social Wellness Month." This month focuses on social wellness, which involves building significant relationships and engaging...

news.headline: Asia-Pacific Smart Metering Market: Home to 1 billion+ connected energy meters; largest market with 1.6 billion customers.
news.summary: According to the latest report "Smart Metering in Asia-Pacific, 6th Edition," smart metering is recognized as vital for upcoming smart grids and is being implemented globally. Developing countries are increasingly initiating large-scale smart metering projects in addition to developed nations. Asia-Pacific leads as the largest metering market worldwide, encompassing over 1.6 billion electricity and gas customers.

news.headline: Paul Davis Restoration supports Red Cross by hosting blood drives, pledges $500,000 donation for disaster relief.
news.summary: In an inspiring demonstration of corporate responsibility and support for communities, Paul Davis Restoration, the top restoration network in the U.S., has committed to donating $500,000 to the American Red Cross' Annual Disaster Giving Program. This generous contribution showcases the company's dedication to aiding in disaster relief efforts and strengthening community resilience.

news.headline: Tim Tebow joins GOVO Venture Partners as Partner - two-time national football champion and Heisman Trophy winner.
news.summary: Tim Tebow, a successful two-time collegiate national football champion quarterback and Heisman Trophy winner, has recently become a Partner at GOVO Venture Partners based in Winter Park, Florida. Tebow, known for his achievements as a first-round NFL draft pick and former professional baseball player, has also made a mark as a five-time New York Times best-selling author, speaker, and football analyst. Apart from his athletic career, Tebow's dedication to philanthropy is evident through his work with the Tim Tebow Foundation, a charitable organization.
